initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_schools,
    schools.City,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm.Educational Option Type LIKE '%Multiple Provision Types%' THEN 1 END) AS schools_with_multiple_provision_types
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm.Low Grade = 'K' AND frpm.High Grade = '8'
GROUP BY schools.City;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS schools_with_multiple_provision_types, COUNT(DISTINCT schools.City) AS cities_with_k_8_span
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm.Low Grade = 'K' AND frpm.High Grade = '8' AND frpm.Educational Option Type = 'Magnet' AND frpm.Educational Option Type LIKE '%,%';

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_schools,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Educational Option Type = 'Multiple Provision Types' THEN 1 END) AS multiple_provision_types_count,
    schools.City
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm.Low Grade = 'K' AND frpm.High Grade = '8'
GROUP BY schools.City;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Number of Schools", schools.City
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm.`Low Grade` = 'K' 
  AND frpm.`High Grade` = '8'
  AND frpm.`Educational Option Type` LIKE '%Magnet%'
  AND frpm.`Educational Option Type` LIKE '%Multiple Provision Types%'
GROUP BY schools.City;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_schools,
    schools.City,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN frpm.Educational Option Type LIKE '%Multiple Provision Types%' THEN 1 END) AS schools_with_multiple_provision_types
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE frpm.Low Grade = 'K' AND frpm.High Grade = '8'
GROUP BY schools.City;
